recommendations.title: Housefull 4
recommendations.overview: Three couples who get separated from each other due to an evil ploy, reincarnate after 600 years and meet each other as history repeats itself again and their respective partners get mixed up this time.

recommendations.title: Men in Hope
recommendations.overview: Charming bon vivant Rudolf is convinced that infidelity is the basis for a happy marriage, since, after all, a woman does not want to be bored with her partner.

recommendations.title: Tod@s Caen
recommendations.overview: A pair of seducers try to prove who has the best techniques while trying not to fall in love with each other.

recommendations.title: She's Having a Baby
recommendations.overview: Jake and Kristy Briggs are newlyweds. Being young, they are perhaps a bit unprepared for the full reality of marriage and all that it (and their parents) expect from them. Do they want babies? Their parents certainly want them to. Is married life all

recommendations.title: West Side Story
recommendations.overview: Two youngsters from rival New York City gangs fall in love, but tensions between their respective friends build toward tragedy.

recommendations.title: Mr. & Mrs. Smith
recommendations.overview: A husband and wife struggle to keep their marriage alive until they realize they are both secretly working as assassins. Now, their respective assignments require them to kill each other.

recommendations.title: My Girl
recommendations.overview: Vada Sultenfuss is obsessed with death. Her mother is dead, and her father runs a funeral parlor. She is also in love with her English teacher, and joins a poetry class over the summer just to impress him. Thomas J., her best friend, is "allergic to

recommendations.title: Snack Shack
recommendations.overview: Inseparable best friends AJ and Moose decide to run the local pool's snack shack after their plan to sell home-brewed beer goes down the drain. Things take a turn when they meet Brooke, an effortlessly cool lifeguard who puts their big plans, and fri

recommendations.title: 5 to 7
recommendations.overview: A young writer begins an affair with an older woman from France whose open marriage to a diplomat dictates that they can meet only between the hours of 5 p.m. to 7 p.m.

recommendations.title: Mean Dreams
recommendations.overview: When two youngsters meet and fall for each other, they must go on the run from the girl's corrupt father, who is also the sheriff of the town.
